education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Environmental Science
Master of Science in Energy Management

experience.title: Energy Analyst
responsibilities: Analyzed energy market trends using EIA and IHS Markit to support project proposals.
Developed energy demand forecasting models using R and Python to enhance project accuracy.
Prepared detailed reports and presentations for upper management on market insights and forecasts.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to drive renewable energy initiatives and compliance.

experience.title: Junior Analyst
responsibilities: Assisted in the development of financial models for investment analysis in renewable projects.
Conducted quantitative analysis using statistical software to support project outcomes.
Supported GIS mapping efforts for potential energy site analysis.

response.summary: Detail-oriented Energy Analyst with a solid background in energy market analysis and demand forecasting. Passionate about renewable energy and committed to driving sustainable initiatives through data-driven insights.
